backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jewellery Order Management System; defines Order, Karigar, and DesignMapping types and exposes CRUD operations for orders, karigars, design mappings, and blob storage including supply, hallmark, and return workflows.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines stable state types and a `run` function to transform the previous actor state (dropping rbStateBackup and rbSummary fields) into the current stable state shape.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their IDs, titles, affected frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for order row layout updates, Ready tab fix, and Hallmark tab fix.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of every page and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Jewellery Order Management System' with a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, ingest, unmapped codes, master designs, design images, tag printing, barcode scanning, karigar detail, reconciliation, and ageing stock), wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Custom: Dashboard tab that filters and displays CO-type Pending orders with a search input supporting order number, design code, and generic name filtering via the OrderTable component.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Design: A modal dialog component that fetches and displays a design image by design code, supporting zoom and pan interactions via mouse and touch events.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Hallma: A dashboard tab that displays orders with Hallmark status, grouped by design code, with search/filter controls, bulk status updates, and delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Kariga: A dashboard tab that groups pending orders by karigar (artisan) name and displays summary cards with order count and total weight, linking to individual karigar detail pages.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/OrderT: A reusable table component for displaying orders with support for row selection, bulk mark-as-ready actions, delete confirmation, and export to Excel/PDF/JPEG.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ReadyT: A dashboard tab that displays orders with Ready status, grouped by design code, with search/filter controls, bulk status updates, and delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Summar: Renders summary metric cards (order counts, weight, quantity, CO orders) for the dashboard, computing tab-specific metrics (ready, hallmark, customer, karigars) from the provided orders array with ghost-row filtering logic.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Suppli: A dialog component that allows users to specify supplied quantities for RB orders, supporting partial supply where remaining units stay as Pending, and submitting via a batch supply mutation.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TotalO: Displays pending orders grouped by design code in an expandable table with search, type, and karigar filters, supporting order deletion, marking as ready, and triggering the supply dialog for RB orders.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Unmapp: Shows an alert banner listing design codes that are missing generic name or karigar name mappings, grouped and summarized, with navigation buttons to the unmapped codes and master designs pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: Renders the application's collapsible sidebar navigation with links to all main routes and a data reset action that opens the DataResetDialog.
frontend/src/components/layout/DataReset: A confirmation alert dialog that permanently deletes all active orders (Pending, Ready, Return from Hallmark statuses) via the resetActiveOrders mutation, with success/error toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/masterdesigns/Ed: A modal dialog component for editing a design's karigar assignment, supporting selection from existing karigars or adding a new one, with save and validation logic.
frontend/src/components/tagprinting/Webv: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering orders, design mappings, master data, karigars, and blob storage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AgeingStock.tsx: A page component that displays pending orders grouped by design code with color-coded age bands (green/yellow/red), supporting bulk selection and marking orders as ready.
frontend/src/pages/BarcodeScanning.tsx: A barcode scanning page that supports both hardware scanner (keyboard buffer) and camera-based QR scanning, accumulating scanned order IDs and allowing batch status updates via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: The main dashboard page that fetches all orders and displays summary cards, an unmapped section, and tabbed views for total orders, ready, hallmark, customer orders, and karigars.
frontend/src/pages/DesignImages.tsx: A page for uploading design images to the backend either from a folder selection or a ZIP file, processing images in batches and tracking upload progress and results.
frontend/src/pages/IngestOrders.tsx: A page for uploading an Excel file of orders, parsing it, and sequentially saving each order to the canister backend with success/failure reporting.
frontend/src/pages/KarigarDetail.tsx: A detail page for a specific karigar showing their pending orders with support for exporting (PDF, JPEG, Excel) and marking selected orders as ready, including a dialog for RB order supply quantities.
frontend/src/pages/MasterDesigns.tsx: A page for uploading and managing master design-to-karigar mappings from an Excel file, with a table view of existing mappings and an edit modal for updating individual design assignments.
frontend/src/pages/Reconciliation.tsx: React page for reconciling a master Excel file against existing orders, parsing rows (including order type, karigar, weight) and persisting matched master data rows via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/TagPrinting.tsx: React page that displays ready orders grouped by design code with date-range filtering, checkbox selection, and a hallmark dialog for bulk status updates.
frontend/src/pages/UnmappedCodes.tsx: React page listing orders with missing generic name or karigar mappings, allowing inline editing and saving via updateDesignMapping or reassignDesign mutations.
frontend/src/utils/ageingBadge.tsx: Exports an AgeingBadge component that displays a color-coded day-count badge (green/amber/red) based on how many days ago an order date occurred.
frontend/src/utils/excelParser.ts: Utility that dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN and parses an Excel file into an array of ParsedOrder objects, normalizing headers, design codes, order types, and dates.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Utility functions for exporting orders to Excel (via SheetJS) or to a PDF grouped and sorted by design code with embedded design images fetched from an actor.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 3) describing an order management dashboard with tabs for Ready, Hallmark, Reconciliation, and Total Orders, documenting architectural notes, known issues, and implemented features for UI layout fixes and order status flow corrections.
